title: Medical Social Worker
description:
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Interview and counsel residents and their families to help them alleviate or resolve their medico-social and financial issues by:

  • Screening the social background of all new applicants and identifying potential cases that need assistance (ﬁnancial and/or social).

  • Liaising with government and voluntary agencies when there are areas of needs.

  • Seeking ﬁnancial support for residents who are unable to pay for nursing home stay.

2. Ensure healthy bed occupancy and conduct basic assessment of suitability of patients/candidates to be admitted into nursing home

3. Joint consultation with medical staff, nurses, other healthcare professionals to discuss plans for total patient management. Participate in patient care conference and family conference

4. Liaise with organisations that provide services (e.g. public assistance, home rehabilitation care services) to meet the needs of the residents and their families

5. Apply for Medifund Assistance and/or other financial assistance for cases that need such help

6. Maintain computerized case records and statistics on residents. The records kept include individuals who have been rejected by family or burnt-out cases

7. Field work involving visiting residents at wards, job placement work places, institutions, other social agencies to help patients alleviate or resolve their ﬁnancial-social problems

8. Prepare social and other related reports for management and other related institutions agencies on request by the ED/Head of MSW

9. Undertake to be well informed on government guidelines on healthcare and social services available within community as well as the latest in the ﬁeld of social work

10. Initiate new support services for ex- residents and/or caregivers

ADDITIONAL DUTIES

11. Assist with work distribution within the department

12. Supervise, coach and appraise the MSW department staff

13. Participate in the training/orientation new staff and volunteers

14. Participate in internal and/or external committee/workgroup activities as well as research work as directed by the Senior MSW or the ED

15. Cover the duties of the other staff (MSW, MSWA) in his/her absence

JOB REQUIREMENTS

(A) EDUCATION, TRAINING AND EXPERIENCE

  • Degree in Social Work/Post Graduate Diploma

  • Minimum 5 years relevant work and supervisory experience, preferably in a healthcare setting

(B) PROFESSIONAL LICENCE

  • Registered Social Worker accredited by Singapore Association of Social Workers

postedCompany.description:
St. Andrew's Mission Hospital (SAMH) first began as a free dispensary for poor local and migrant women and children in 1913.  Today, SAMH operates St. Andrew's Community Hospital, St. Andrew’s Autism Centre, St. Andrew’s Mission Hospital Clinics, St. Andrew’s Nursing Homes at Buangkok, Henderson and Queenstown and St. Andrew’s Senior Care centres at Kampong Glam, Tampines, Henderson and Queenstown.


St. John's-St. Margaret’s Nursing Home and Senior Care Centre at Dover Avenue will begin operations in 2021.
postedCompany.name: ST ANDREW'S MISSION HOSPITAL
